name: Phase Checkpoint Gate
description: Validate phase checkpoint completeness before advancing to next phase

then.prompt: If the current write operation targets a file matching **/artifacts/phase*_checkpoint.yaml, verify that all required checks for the corresponding phase have passed according to the coverage_board. If any required check is missing or failed, DENY the write and list the missing items. If the file does not match the checkpoint pattern, ALLOW the write to proceed.
